message:
🌱 Add knative-eventing: Expression language for Trigger filter mission (#1490)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "knative-eventing-3359-expression-language-for-trigger-filter",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "knative-eventing: Expression language for Trigger filter",
+    "description": "Expression language for Trigger filter. Requested by 8+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current knative-eventing deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your knative-eventing version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing\nhelm list -n knative-eventing 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working knative-eventing installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review knative-eventing configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant knative-eventing configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing\nkubectl get configmap -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=knative-eventing\n```\n**Problem**\nNow the `Trigger` filtering abilities are poor, because they require direct match on specific `CloudEvent` attributes."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Expression language for Trigger filter",
+        "description": "I agree with  and others on timing: This is important but seems like it can be a backward compatible addition post-v1. I welcome contrary opinions. :smiley:\n\nI commented on the (in)feasibility of Javascript as a filtering language at\n```yaml\napiVersion: eventing.knative.dev/v1beta1\nkind: Trigger\nmetadata:\n  name: my-service-trigger\nspec:\n  broker: default\n  filter:\n    predicate: my-extension-value == dev.knative.foo.bar || type == dev.knative.foo.bar\n  subscriber:\n    ref:\n      apiVersion: serving.knative.dev/v1\n      kind: Service\n      name: my-service\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing\nkubectl get events -n knative-eventing --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Expression language for Trigger filter\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I agree with  and others on timing: This is important but seems like it can be a backward compatible addition post-v1. I welcome contrary opinions.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: eventing.knative.dev/v1beta1\nkind: Trigger\nmetadata:\n  name: my-service-trigger\nspec:\n  broker: default\n  filter:\n    predicate: my-extension-value == dev.knative.foo.bar || type == dev.knative.foo.bar\n  subscriber:\n    ref:\n      apiVersion: serving.knative.dev/v1\n      kind: Service\n      name: my-service",
+        "predicate:\n  allOf:\n   - properties:\n       attribute-a:\n         const: aaa\n   - properties:\n       attribute-b:\n         const: bbb",
+        "# spitballing, this doesn't actually exist\nspec:\n  filters:\n    attributes:\n      type: BuiltIn\n    javascript:\n      type: Remote\n      ref:\n        apiVersion: v1\n        kind: Service\n        name: javascript-event-filter"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "knative-eventing",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "knative-eventing"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/knative/eventing/issues/3359",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/knative/eventing"
+    },
+    "reactions": 8,
+    "comments": 30,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with knative-eventing installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-19T06:26:41.987Z",

+}
